claims.headline: Sharpens attention
claims.notesSentence: A 28-day RCT in healthy adolescents reported improved attention and psychomotor speed vs. placebo.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Citicoline adolescent attention RCT on PubMed

claims.headline: Improves verbal memory
claims.notesSentence: A randomized trial reported improvements in verbal memory in healthy older adults with relatively inefficient memory.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Citicoline verbal memory trial on PubMed
